title: Robin Nears Enies Lobby
description: The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Wanze, Zoro, Nami, Sanji. The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well then!! I'll have you know...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why I was chosen for this job!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...to make my dreamy, edible battle suit!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: How dare you disgrace food like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: My speed, strength, and special abilities...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Stop yapping and get on with it!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm the officer of the 3rd car...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The newly recruited CPS four-form user!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Couldn't you wait for us inside!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But I wonder... who's that behind you?

summary: The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.
